blended.narrative: Loveland is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,607 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 3.0" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.6" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 34".
